summary: Regression testing after bulk maroon->purple replacement across 37 files. Backend (9/9 pytest tests pass) and frontend (homepage carousel, all 6 navigation routes, commodity sub-pages, contact form end-to-end submission) all working. Purple theme is consistently applied with zero residual maroon. No console errors, no broken images, no broken layouts.

issues: HTML <title> is still 'Emergent | Fullstack App' (frontend/public/index.html) instead of 'Peninsula Agritrade LLC'. Cosmetic but hurts SEO/branding.

passed_tests: Backend pytest (9/9): /api/health, /api/insights (list + by slug), /api/jobs (list + by slug), /api/partners, /api/memberships, /api/contact submission, /api/commodities optional
Homepage carousel: 3 dot controls present, clicking dots 0/1/2 cycles slides without layout shift
Homepage subtext renders cleanly with whitespace-pre-line (Slide 1 'A fully integrated agri-supply chain manager... connecting agricultural producers with consumers across the globe.')

Navigation routes verified with H1/H2 captured: /about ('Who We Are'), /commodities ('At A Glance'), /partners ('Our Partners'), /careers ('Careers'), /contact ('Contact Us'), /insights ('Market Insights')
Commodity sub-pages: /commodities/grains-feeds, /oilseeds, /pulses-beans, /sugar-rice, /coffee all linked from dropdown; sub-page heading 'Grains & Feeds' renders
Contact page renders custom logo, embedded Google Maps iframe (Doha QFC Tower 1), and full form with data-testids (contact-form-name/email/subject/message)
Contact form end-to-end: POST /api/contact -> 200, success toast 'Message sent successfully!' + 'Message Sent!' success state shown
Purple theme: 18 elements detected using purple (#7C3AED/#8B5CF6 family); 0 maroon (#7B1E2F / rgb(123,30,47)) residue anywhere in DOM or source
No broken images (0 images failed to load)
No console errors, no page errors on any tested route
action_items: Optional (low priority): Update <title> in /app/frontend/public/index.html from 'Emergent | Fullstack App' to 'Peninsula Agritrade LLC' for proper browser tab + SEO branding.
critical_code_review_comments: Browser tab title is still the boilerplate 'Emergent | Fullstack App'. Should be updated in /app/frontend/public/index.html for a corporate-grade site.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_api.py (new pytest regression suite, replaces older script-style /app/backend_test.py)
seed_data_creation: None. Contact form POST creates one TEST_ record via /api/contact; harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py - run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Form data-testids on contact page: contact-form-name, contact-form-email, contact-form-subject, contact-form-message. The bulk maroon->purple sed migration is clean: zero maroon residue in source or rendered DOM. Hero carousel uses dot buttons (3 slides). Hero subtext fix with whitespace-pre-line works correctly.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Bulk find/replace migration from maroon->purple is verified intact across all 9 pages and the hero subtext whitespace-pre-line fix renders properly.
